site.name: Liozu Villa
site.slogan: A Private Garden Villa · Slow Down and Unwind
site.description: Rice fields sway in the breeze beneath blue skies and white clouds — a rare sense of calm and ease. Come let nature recharge you.
site.address: No. 6, Ln. 189, Sec. 2, Dongshan Rd., Dongshan Township, Yilan County, Taiwan

intro.heading: A Private Garden Villa
intro.text: Nestled among the mountains, this private garden villa offers four-season views from its glass house and outdoor barbecue gatherings — a getaway far from the hustle and bustle.

features.title: Private Garden
features.text: A standalone villa with its own private garden.

features.title: Glass House Views
features.text: Enjoy four-season scenery, surrounded by nature.

features.title: Outdoor BBQ
features.text: An outdoor barbecue area for gatherings with friends and family.

about.heading: About Us
paragraphs: Nestled among the mountains, this private garden villa offers four-season views from its glass house and outdoor barbecue gatherings — a getaway far from the hustle and bustle.

map.heading: Location
map.note: Feel free to reach us on LINE or Instagram for detailed directions.

intro.heading: Facilities
intro.subheading: Whole-house rental · Rooms and shared facilities

items.label: Rental
items.value: Whole-house booking only; individual rooms are not rented separately.

items.label: Rooms
value: Type 1 large rooms ×3 (with sofa bed), Type 2 standard rooms ×4

items.label: Capacity
items.value: The 3 sofa-bed rooms add up to 6 more guests; recommended maximum 18 adults to ensure a comfortable stay.

items.label: Bathroom
items.value: Rooms do not have private bathrooms; two shared bathrooms are available throughout the house.

rooms.note: * This is a whole-house B&B; whole-house booking only. Individual rooms are not rented separately. Actual availability and rates are confirmed via LINE.

list.name: Type 1 ‧ Large Room
list.description: A spacious large room with a sofa bed, sleeping up to 4 — ideal for families or groups of friends.

list.name: Type 2 ‧ Standard Room
list.description: A comfortable double room with air conditioning for a restful stay.

list.name: Living Room (with Karaoke)
list.description: A spacious living room with karaoke — sing your heart out and relax with friends and family.

list.name: Kids' Play Area
list.description: A dedicated play space, with a baby cot available, where children can have fun while the grown-ups relax.

list.name: Splash Pool
list.description: An outdoor splash pool — perfect for cooling off and playing in summer — plus a barbecue grill for outdoor BBQ gatherings. (Use of the splash pool costs an extra NT$1,500.)

list.name: Automatic Mahjong Table
list.description: An automatic mahjong table for fun-filled gatherings with friends and family.

list.name: Kitchen
list.description: An open kitchen fully equipped with an induction cooker and gas stove, fridge, hot & cold water dispenser, toaster oven, and tableware — everything you need to cook your own meals.

list.name: Shared Bathrooms
list.description: Two clean, well-kept shared bathrooms serve the whole house, convenient for all guests.

intro.heading: Reservation
intro.subheading: How to book, check-in notes, and policies

steps: Ask about availability and pricing via LINE
Pay a 50% deposit to confirm your booking (deposit is non-refundable)
Before or on the day of check-in, pay the remaining 50% balance plus a NT$5,000 security deposit, and settle any splash-pool / barbecue fees (if applicable)
After check-out, once the property is confirmed undamaged, the security deposit is fully refunded

notes.label: Deposit
notes.desc: A 50% deposit is required at booking. The deposit is non-refundable.

notes.label: Date changes
notes.desc: If your plans change, please notify us at least 7 days before check-in (or earlier). The deposit may be carried over once; late notice or more than one change forfeits the deposit with no extension.

notes.label: Balance & security deposit
notes.desc: Before or on the day of check-in, pay the remaining 50% balance plus a NT$5,000 security deposit, and settle any splash-pool / barbecue cleaning fees. The deposit is fully refunded after check-out if the property is undamaged.

notes.label: Splash pool
notes.desc: Use of the splash pool costs an extra NT$1,500. Please walk slowly and watch your step around the pool; children must be supervised by an adult at all times.

notes.label: Barbecue
notes.desc: Before leaving the barbecue area, please make sure the flames are completely extinguished.

notes.label: Self check-in
notes.desc: This is a self check-in stay. The kitchen is fully equipped — please use it with care and clean up thoroughly afterwards. Drain and flatten trash, sort it, and place it in the bins or trash bags.

notes.label: Pets
notes.desc: Pets are welcome — NT$300 per pet.

notes.label: Smoking
notes.desc: Non-smoking throughout; please smoke only in designated areas.

notes.label: Security & CCTV
notes.desc: CCTV cameras are installed around the exterior and shared areas for guests' safety.

notes.label: Commercial use
notes.desc: Commercial activities / filming / ceremonies require prior approval and incur additional fees.

notes.label: Prohibited
notes.desc: Drugs, drinking games, and any disruptive or illegal activities are strictly prohibited; violators will be reported to the authorities.

booking.disclaimer: * Actual fees and terms are confirmed with the B&B at the time of booking.

items.label: By car
items.text: Search the villa name in your navigation app; parking is available on site.
